auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Drata API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or view API keys in Drata as documented at https://help.drata.com/en/articles/6695964.

extraFields.label: Region
extraFields.description: The Drata public API region for your account: us, eu, or apac. Leave blank for the default US API host documented by Drata.

actions.name: get_company
actions.description: Get company metadata for the connected Drata account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting Drata company metadata.

accountId.description: The Drata account ID for the company.

company.description: The Drata company metadata for the connected account.

raw.description: The raw Drata object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting Drata company metadata.

actions.name: get_control
actions.description: Get one Drata control by ID or code-prefixed identifier.

anyOf.description: A control code prefixed with code:, such as code:DCF-37.

controlId.description: The control ID or a code-prefixed identifier.

cursor.description: The Drata cursor returned in pagination.cursor by a previous list response.

size.description: The number of results to return.

sort.description: The Drata field name to sort by.

sortDir.description: The direction to sort returned data.

expand.description: Related Drata subcollections and sub-objects to expand.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a Drata control.

control.description: The raw Drata object returned by the API.

raw.description: The raw Drata object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting a Drata control.

actions.name: get_personnel
actions.description: Get one Drata personnel record by ID or email-prefixed identifier.

anyOf.description: An email-prefixed identifier such as email:user@example.com.

personnelId.description: The personnel ID or an email-prefixed identifier.

expand.description: Related Drata subcollections and sub-objects to expand.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting Drata personnel.

personnel.description: The raw Drata object returned by the API.

raw.description: The raw Drata object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting Drata personnel.

actions.name: get_vendor
actions.description: Get one Drata vendor by ID.

expand.description: Related Drata subcollections and sub-objects to expand.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a Drata vendor.

vendor.description: The raw Drata object returned by the API.

raw.description: The raw Drata object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting a Drata vendor.

actions.name: list_controls
actions.description: List controls in a Drata workspace.

cursor.description: The Drata cursor returned in pagination.cursor by a previous list response.

size.description: The number of results to return.

sort.description: The Drata field name to sort by.

sortDir.description: The direction to sort returned data.

includeTotalCount.description: Whether Drata should include totalCount on the first page of results.

expand.description: Related Drata subcollections and sub-objects to expand.

isMonitored.description: Whether to filter controls by monitor presence.

isReady.description: Whether to filter controls by readiness.

hasEvidence.description: Whether to filter controls by evidence presence.

hasPolicy.description: Whether to filter controls by policy presence.

hasPassingTest.description: Whether to filter controls with at least one passing test.

ticketStatus.description: The task management ticket status to filter controls by.

policyId.description: The policy ID to filter controls by.

isEnabled.description: Whether to filter controls by enabled status.

isArchived.description: Whether to filter controls by archived status.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Drata controls.

items.description: The raw Drata object returned by the API.

data.description: The Drata records returned for the current page.

anyOf.description: The cursor to pass to the next list request, when present.
The total count returned when includeTotalCount is used.

raw.description: The raw Drata list response returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Drata controls.

actions.description: List Drata personnel visible to the current API key.

size.description: The number of results to return.

sort.description: The Drata field name to sort by.

sortDir.description: The direction to sort returned data.

includeTotalCount.description: Whether Drata should include totalCount on the first page of results.

expand.description: Related Drata subcollections and sub-objects to expand.

employmentStatus.description: Employment statuses to filter personnel by.

complianceStatus.description: Overall compliance statuses to filter personnel by.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Drata personnel.

items.description: The raw Drata object returned by the API.

data.description: The Drata records returned for the current page.

anyOf.description: The cursor to pass to the next list request, when present.
The total count returned when includeTotalCount is used.

raw.description: The raw Drata list response returned by the API.
